overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a green cloak exploring a grand gothic castle interior with high vaulted ceilings, stone staircases, and museum-like exhibits. The character walks through halls, ascends multiple staircases, and passes other student NPCs in an atmospheric environment with natural light streaming through tall windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with main staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand entrance hall toward the main staircase

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking across the hall

entered.detail: large stone staircase with carved railings leading to upper level
ornate stone arch framing the upper landing
ornate hanging light fixture with multiple candles
tall gothic windows letting in natural light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast gothic entrance hall with high vaulted ceilings, approaching a grand stone staircase. Other students are scattered throughout the hall, and ornate iron chandeliers hang from above.

events.description: begins ascending the main stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase, turning left as the stairs wind upward

entered.detail: massive arched window with intricate designs at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand stone staircase, with carved railings on either side. A large stained glass window becomes visible at the landing above, casting colored light onto the steps.

events.description: reaches the upper landing with large window and exhibit displays
turns around and begins walking away from the large window

agents.ego_description: approaching the large window to examine the globe, then turning to explore the upper hall

notable_agents.action: student walking past the skeleton exhibit

entered.detail: ornate bronze and wood astronomical globe on a decorative stand
large skeletal remains of a winged creature on a raised platform

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the bright upper landing dominated by a massive stained glass window. An ornate orrery globe and a creature skeleton are displayed here. The character turns and walks away from the window, passing another student.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with gryphon statue and seating

events.description: enters darker corridor area with statues and benches

agents.ego_description: walking past the gryphon statue and continuing through the corridor toward the secondary stairs

notable_agents.action: student sitting on a bench reading a book

entered.detail: large stone statue of a winged gryphon on a pedestal
green padded benches for seating along the corridor
smaller stone staircase leading to upper levels

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker corridor featuring a prominent gryphon statue and upholstered benches. A student sits reading on one of the benches as the character approaches a secondary staircase.

events.description: ascends the secondary staircase to the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the secondary staircase and approaching the large framed painting at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: large framed painting depicting a historical scene with figures
dark wooden doors with metal handles set in the stone wall
wall-mounted candle holders providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the secondary staircase into a darker upper corridor illuminated by wall sconces. At the end of the hall, a large historical painting in an ornate frame dominates the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, light-filled gothic entrance hall into the more intimate, shadowed corridors of an upper gallery. It begins by following the character through the grand hall beneath vaulted ceilings and iron chandeliers, moving steadily toward a massive stone staircase. As the character ascends the stairs, the lighting shifts from natural brightness to vibrant hues cast by a large stained glass window that dominates the upper landing alongside an orrery and a creature skeleton. The scene then transitions into a darker corridor featuring a gryphon statue and students resting on upholstered benches before turning toward a secondary staircase. Finally, the camera climbs into a dim upper hallway illuminated by wall sconces, ending its journey before a large historical painting in an ornate frame.
